feed.title: realufo.org — Spain · Ejército del Aire
feed.subtitle: Latest declassified records mirrored from Spain · Ejército del Aire.
feed.rights: Per-source jurisdiction (US 17 U.S.C. §105, UK OGL v3, France Loi 78-753, Brazil LAI 12.527, Chile 20.285, etc.)

entry.title: Ejército del Aire y del Espacio — homepage
entry.summary: Official site of Spain's air force. Archive-access requests + declassified-file viewing logistics are described here.

entry.title: Archivo Histórico del Ejército del Aire
entry.summary: Historical archive holding the declassified UFO files (Madrid). On-site access by appointment.

entry.title: Ministerio de Defensa — Portal de la Cultura de Defensa
entry.summary: Spain's defence culture portal — historical research guides including the Air Force collection.
